headline: Fasten Your Seatbelt
summary: AI & semiconductor stock valuations look stretched as FOMO fuels premium multiples & IPO euphoria. Click for my take at the markets & where they may be headed.

headline: Stocks Push Higher on US Labor Market Strength and AI Spending
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.24%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.26%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +0.29%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +0.20%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: NVTS Stock: What the Neutral Stance Means at Today's Valuation
summary: Navitas has soared 249% YTD, and its lofty valuation now demands clear follow-through as it scales high-power AI data-center revenue.

headline: Is KLA Corporation Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: KLA Corporation has outperformed the broader Nasdaq Composite over the past year, and Wall Street analysts remain fairly upbeat about the stock’s future prospects.
